title: DiscordMinecraftFabric
description: A simple minecraft <--> discord link for fabric
body:
> DO NOT USE: this was a demo mod and is not suitable for servers A simple way to link minecraft and discord for fabric! It should work for every minecraft version but I haven't tested it.

It has the following features: * [commands](https://github.com/BradBot1/DiscordMinecraftFabric/blob/master/README.md) * d!register to register channels * d!unregister to unregister channels * d!auth to give users command access * d!unauth to remove users command access * versatile chat link * multiple discord servers/channels can have the link * you can toggle if a channel can send messages to ingame * when you send a message from discord it appears in the other channels with the following format: [serverName][yourName]: yourMessage * if you are ingame you do not see what channel the message was sent from

[GitHub (source code)](https://github.com/BradBot1/DiscordMinecraftFabric) [Submit a bug report](https://github.com/BradBot1/DiscordMinecraftFabric/issues/new)

This is a hastily put together mod, so if you find any bugs or have any feature suggestions report them as a GitHub issue!
